title: JARVIS Step 47 — Read-Only Latest-Snapshot Comparison for /api/jarvis/ask
purpose: Let JARVIS answer 'what changed since last snapshot?' by reading the offline-generated storage/jarvis/snapshots/latest_snapshot.json display-only and comparing it to the current read-only /api/jarvis/status state. Display/read-only only: no snapshot creation, no browser writes, no refresh endpoint, no execution, no trading control.
relation_to_prior_steps: Step 44 (5d0bdf3) planned the offline snapshot + a future ask-side diff. Step 45 (b737e4a) implemented the offline operator-run snapshot script. Step 47 implements the Step 46-plan recommendation: the read-only ask path READS latest_snapshot.json to compute a verified diff vs current status. Reading only; still no browser write, no refresh, no execution, no trading authorization.
files_changed_or_created: app.py — added _JARVIS_LATEST_SNAPSHOT path constant; _jarvis_read_latest_snapshot() (read-only, returns missing/invalid/ok, fails closed); _jarvis_current_comparable() (builds in-memory snapshot-shaped current view via the offline tool's pure build_snapshot, writes nothing); _jarvis_compare_snapshot(prev, curr) (pure read-only diff over whitelisted safe fields); rewrote _jarvis_what_changed_answer() to branch on snapshot availability (missing/invalid/ok), preserving Step 43 behavior when no baseline exists.

tests/test_jarvis_ask_contract.py — 14 Step 47 tests; the two Step 43 content tests now monkeypatch the snapshot path to a missing file so they keep validating the no-baseline path deterministically even though an offline runtime snapshot exists on disk.
explicitly_not_done: No jarvis_conversation_safety.py change — existing 'changed'/'what is new'/'change summary' SAFE_INFO patterns already route every listed question; no classifier change needed.
No tools/jarvis_snapshot_report.py change (imported read-only, not modified).
No logs added; no data fetched; no broker/paper/live control; no trade run or simulated.
No new response fields; response keeps exactly answer/safety_class/sources_used/refused/refusal_reason.
compared_fields: trading_detail posture flags: read_only, paper_ready, live_ready, broker_control, state, candidate_status
answer_sections: Verified changes since latest snapshot (captured <generated_at>) — the diff, or 'none — every compared read-only field matches the latest snapshot'.
Current status — the same read-only current-state summary as Step 43.
Unknown / not compared — which fields are compared; sensitive data never compared/exposed; no trading authorized.
missing_snapshot_behavior: Keeps Step 43 behavior: says no stored baseline exists, summarizes current read-only status only, explicitly claims no changes, says it cannot compare against a previous snapshot yet.
valid_snapshot_behavior: Reads the snapshot display-only, builds the current comparable, and reports verified differences only (e.g. 'git HEAD changed X -> Y', 'commander state changed A -> B', 'warning count changed N -> M', 'trading posture paper_ready changed True -> False (reporting only; no trading authorized)', 'latest trading reports changed: added X; removed Y', 'cache freshness overall changed A -> B', count and status key count/hash changes). Never asserts a change not backed by both values.
corrupt_snapshot_behavior: Fails closed: says the latest snapshot is unavailable/invalid, summarizes current status only, does not crash (HTTP 200), and shows no 'Verified changes' section.

forbidden_mixed_still_refused: what changed since last snapshot and refresh status -> FORBIDDEN
what changed since last snapshot and write a snapshot -> FORBIDDEN
what changed since last snapshot and start trading -> FORBIDDEN

conclusion: JARVIS now answers 'what changed since last snapshot?' by reading the offline-generated latest_snapshot.json display-only and comparing it field-by-field to the current read-only status, reporting verified differences only and separating 'Verified changes since latest snapshot' / 'Current status' / 'Unknown / not compared'. Missing snapshot keeps the Step 43 no-baseline answer; corrupt snapshot fails closed without crashing. The ask path writes nothing, creates/repairs/refreshes no snapshot, adds no endpoint/UI/refresh/execution, and authorizes no trading. Response keeps its five fields with no command/action/order keys; /api/jarvis/status stays at 24 keys with trading flags locked false. 393 tests pass (+14). Nothing staged or committed.
